untranslatable_reason: Signal relies on fundamental calendar events and market consensus/sentiment bias which are NOT available as technical indicators in the allowed list. The core logic ('enter before news, exit on news release') cannot be expressed using only price/volume-based technical indicators. Calendar-based event detection and sentiment analysis require external data sources not in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted a partial translation using ADX for directional momentum and pivot levels as a neutral exit point, but this loses the essential event-driven timing component. The signal fundamentally requires: (1) a calendar event detection system, (2) consensus forecast data, and (3) news release timestamps—none of which are available in technical indicators. A proper backtest would need these data sources integrated separately.
